name: Nkwụsị obi nke agịga (NCD)
description: Ihe enyemaka mberede nke pneumothorax erughị ala site na ntinye agịga n'ime oghere intercostal nke abụọ. Ntinye aka na-azọpụta ndụ.
steps: Chọpụta pneumothorax erughị ala: ụda ume na-anọghị n'akụkụ emetụtara, tracheal deviation (mbubreyo), nsogbu iku ume, hypotension, JVD.
Chọta oghere intercostal nke abụọ, ahịrị midclavicular (ọzọ: 4th/5th ICS, ahịrị axillary anterior).
Fanye 14g, 3.25-inch agịga-catheter perpendicular na mgbidi igbe, dị n'elu TOP nke ọgịrịga nke atọ (na-ezere ngwugwu neurovascular).
Na-aga n'ihu ruo mgbe a na-enwe mmetụta nke ikuku ma ọ bụ na-anụ ọkụ.
Wepu agịga ma hapụ catheter n'ebe.
Gee ntị maka mmelite ụda ume na mbọ iku ume.
Chekwaa oghere catheter. Ejikọla ma ọ bụ kpuchie njedebe mepere emepe.
Nyochaa kwa nkeji 5 ọ bụla -- catheter nwere ike ịgbachi ma ọ bụ mechie, na-achọ mgbakasị ahụ ugboro ugboro.
warnings: Jiri agịga 3.25-inch - ọkọlọtọ 14g angiocatheter (1.5in) na-adakarị na ndị ọrịa agha n'ihi ihe agha ahụ na anụ ahụ.
Enwere ike ịchọrọ NCD nke abụọ ma ọ bụrụ na ejighị n'aka akụkụ nke emetụtara yana onye ọrịa na-ejide ya.
Edokwala n'otu akụkụ ahụ dị ka ịṅụ ara ọnya obi na-ebughị ụzọ mechie ọnya ahụ.

pediatric.note: Jiri agịga nha nke ọma (ndị ọrịa pere mpe, 1.5-2in nwere ike zuo oke). Jiri ụzọ ICS MCL nke abụọ. Nchọpụta akara ala siri ike karịa -- jiri nlezianya mee ihe.
